flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of North Alabama rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.6k → $12.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of North Alabama rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.2k → $22.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of North Alabama fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of North Alabama rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 (28.3% → 35.5%).
